3254770.name: Aetherdale Demo
3254770.description:
Venture into (a demo version of) the treacherous regions of Aetherdale - a kingdom ablaze with magic and warfare. Assemble an arsenal of weapons and artifacts, to become an unstoppable force of destruction. Take control of powerful combat forms that defy the limits of natural magic.

IN THIS DEMO

Fight through the first region in your journey through Aetherdale - the Forests. This region includes three areas and two different bosses. You will have access to a subset of the Idol forms, weaponry, and trinkets that will be present in the full game.

SHAPE AETHERDALE'S FUTURE

Your feedback on Aetherdale is critical to developing it into the best game it can be. Please use this demo to consider how the game could be improved upon and provide feedback.
